languages.original_text: "A crude attempt at manipulation. You will see nothing 'fair' in what is about to happen to you."

languages.text: "Примитивная попытка манипуляции. Ничто в том, что нам предстоит, не покажется тебе "честным"".

languages.text: «Qué intento tan pueril para manipularme. Créeme, lo que te va a suceder no tendrá nada de "justo"».

languages.text: “拙劣的激将法。你即将遭遇的一切，可没有半点‘公平’可言。”
languages.original_text: "A crude attempt at manipulation. You will see nothing 'fair' in what is about to happen to you."

traits.locale_text: “拙劣的激将法。你即将遭遇的一切，可没有半点‘公平’可言。”

languages.text: « Une tentative risible de manipulation. Le sort qui vous attend sera tout sauf "loyal". »
languages.original_text: "A crude attempt at manipulation. You will see nothing 'fair' in what is about to happen to you."

traits.locale_text: « Une tentative risible de manipulation. Le sort qui vous attend sera tout sauf "loyal". »

languages.text: "Kaba bir manipülasyon girişimi. Birazdan başına geleceklerde 'adil' hiçbir şey göremeyeceksin."

traits.locale_text: "Kaba bir manipülasyon girişimi. Birazdan başına geleceklerde 'adil' hiçbir şey göremeyeceksin."

languages.text: "Ein primitiver Manipulationsversuch. Du wirst nichts von dem 'fair' finden, was dir gleich passieren wird."

languages.text: 「粗末な操り人形の試み。これからあなたに起こることは、決して『公正』なものにはなりません。」
